case_title: TERI TENCER-CUTLER ET AL VS. ZELDA SHERWOOD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY SHERWOOD, ZELDA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TENCER-CUTLER, TERI CUTLER, RICHARD S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-01-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHERWOOD, ZELDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY CROSS-DEFENDANT ZELDA SHERWOOD AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS TERI TENCER-CUTLER & RICHARD CUTLER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE, BUT CROSS-DEFENDANTS AGREE TO WAIVE SERVICE OF MS. SHERWOOD'S CROSS-COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,800.00 FILED BY TENCER-CUTLER, TERI CUTLER, RICHARD S AS TO DEFENDANT SHERWOOD, ZELDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS TERI TENCER-CUTLER & RICHARD CUTLER, AND DEFENDANT ZELDA SHERWOOD. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SHERWOOD, ZELDA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TENCER-CUTLER, TERI CUTLER, RICHARD S $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,825.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENCER-CUTLER, TERI CUTLER, RICHARD S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHERWOOD, ZELDA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
